decisions.details: Worktree isolation was creating worktrees from stale base c0848e6 because refs/remotes/origin/master + refs/remotes/origin/HEAD pointed to old README commit. Fixed via `git update-ref refs/remotes/origin/master d70f60d` + `git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD refs/remotes/origin/master`. Local-only, no push. All fresh worktrees now inherit correct base.

Plan 05 template + CLAUDE.md earlier referenced `uv run alphaswarm web --reload` which fails with 'No such file or directory' because only `start = alphaswarm.cli:main_tui` is registered in pyproject.toml. Correct command confirmed working by user: `uv run uvicorn alphaswarm.web.app:app --reload --port 8000` (Uvicorn startup + 34-entry holdings snapshot + providers_wired + phase: idle).

Plan 04 shipped frontend/src/components/TweaksPanelLoader.tsx with React.lazy + import.meta.env.DEV gate but did not swap app.jsx + app_v2.jsx imports. Bundle leak preflight flagged TweaksPanel in prod build. Fixed by swapping import + JSX element in both files (commit 5c7c04d). Verified: grep -cF TweaksPanel dist/assets/index-*.js → 0.

Plan 03 (worktree ab05790d) + Plan 04 (worktree a3050bff) dispatched concurrently after origin-ref fix. Both completed clean. Merged via `git merge --no-ff --no-verify` — no conflicts despite overlapping types.ts/adapter changes.

blockers.summary: Human UAT required before phase completion
blockers.detail: Plan 05 Task 3 is autonomous:false / checkpoint:human-verify. Phase cannot close until user returns with resume signal.

blockers.summary: Backend spawn command — do not regress
blockers.detail: Future UAT instructions must use `uv run uvicorn alphaswarm.web.app:app --reload --port 8000`, not `uv run alphaswarm web --reload`.

Several .claude/worktrees/agent-* dirs locked by prior Claude Code agent pids. `git worktree remove` failed with lock errors. Leftover branches don't block anything (merged via `--no-ff`). Run `git worktree prune -f` after Claude sessions release locks.
